sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, created_at DateTime, amount Float64, grp UInt8) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT uniqCombined64(value) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE created_at >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00')) AS filtered_data;
SELECT g.grp, uniqCombined64(value) FROM (SELECT value, grp FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) g GROUP BY g.grp HAVING g.grp < 3;
SELECT amount, uniqCombined64(value) AS unique_values FROM (SELECT id, amount, value FROM test_table WHERE amount IS NOT NULL OR value <> '') tmp GROUP BY amount;

SELECT a.grp, uniqCombined64(y.value) FROM (SELECT id, grp FROM test_table) a GLOBAL IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS valid_ids JOIN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE created_at > '2023-01-01 00:00:00') y ON a.id = y.id GROUP BY a.grp;
SELECT uniqCombined64(NULLIF(amount, 0)) FROM test_table WHERE created_at <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
SELECT COUNT(*), uniqCombined64(value) AS unique_values FROM (SELECT value, grp FROM test_table WHERE grp >= (SELECT MAX(grp) FROM test_table) - 1) GROUP BY value;
CREATE TABLE tmp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE grp = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, uniqCombined64(value) FROM tmp_table GROUP BY id HAVING total > 1;
